description: `(first [])[1]` (issue #407/F7): the postfix expression's arbitrary BASE fails to evaluate — `first` on an empty list raises `ol-range` before any segment is even resolved — exercising `readPostfixExpression`'s base-evaluation failure path in `evaluate.ts`, distinct from a segment-resolution failure.

diagnostics.message: first needs a non-empty word or list, but got an empty one.
